transcript: Oh, you guys, hold on, hold on, wait, wait, I think that it's only fair that half of whatever's in this box goes to my best friend, Hector Cerrone. Welcome back, is he swell? Did you say Cerrone? Sure did. Oh, my God, is that really worth $25,000? Hold on, take the tape. 18, 18, 18. How long have you been through tonight? 19, I'm fine. What's the world, honey? It's worth a lot more now. Millions. Millions.
